gate_g09.evidence: n_obs=12, live_file=True; rate_cov=75.0%; equity_cov=100.0%; kupiec95_p=0.267; var99_breach=0.0%; report_populated=True; audit_entry_id=3dc9334eeef94b42a33e42dd6efecf39
gate_g09.gate_description: Backtesting against live CNY market data: >=10 annual observations, rate/equity coverage >=70%, Kupiec VaR95 p>0.05, VaR99 breach <=5%, populated annual report, governance audit entry (SOA ASOP 56 §3.5; IA TAS M §3.6)

recalibration.rationale: 1 trigger(s) breached (oos_coverage_drift); worst severity HIGH -> SCHEDULE_RECALIBRATION.

triggers.name: rate_band_coverage
triggers.rationale: Realised short rates fall outside the P-measure band too often.
triggers.recommended_action: Recalibrate HW1F mean-reversion (a) and short-rate vol (sigma_r) on refreshed CNY curve history.

triggers.name: equity_band_coverage
triggers.rationale: Realised equity returns fall outside the P-measure band too often.
triggers.recommended_action: Recalibrate GBM equity drift (ERP) and vol (sigma_S) on refreshed CSI 300 history.

triggers.name: kupiec_var95_pof
triggers.rationale: Kupiec POF rejects the VaR95 exception frequency.
triggers.recommended_action: Review 95% tail calibration / scenario count; re-estimate loss-proxy dispersion.

triggers.name: kupiec_var99_pof
triggers.rationale: Kupiec POF rejects the VaR99 exception frequency.
triggers.recommended_action: Review 99% tail calibration; re-estimate tail-loss dispersion and dependence.

triggers.name: var99_breach_rate
triggers.rationale: VaR99 exceedances exceed the regulatory tolerance.
triggers.recommended_action: Recalibrate the tail; escalate to Model Owner for capital-adequacy review.

triggers.name: var95_breach_rate
triggers.rationale: VaR95 exceedances above the monitoring tolerance.
triggers.recommended_action: Monitor; schedule a calibration review if the breach persists next cycle.

triggers.name: martingale_q_measure
triggers.rationale: Q-measure martingale test failed (risk-neutral drift off).
triggers.recommended_action: Re-run the risk-neutral drift correction before any revaluation; do not re-baseline the headline.

triggers.name: oos_coverage_drift
triggers.rationale: In-sample vs out-of-sample band coverage diverges (parameter instability).
triggers.recommended_action: Schedule recalibration with a rolling-window stability check (VR-S05).

unsigned_banner: UNSIGNED - educational-proxy market history resolved via the item-#1 live pipeline (file_fixture tier); replace with a credentialled ChinaBond/CSI/Wind extract and obtain Model-Owner sign-off before any regulatory or capital-adequacy use. Governed headline figures are NOT re-baselined here.
